who_i_am.title: WHO I AM
who_i_am.sub_slogan: Integrating Industrial Efficiency into Full-Stack Development

data.title: Cinema Main & Reservation System
data.goal: Design a structured web architecture using semantic markup and implement dynamic reservation UIs
features: Ensured web standards and scalability through strategic semantic markup design
Implemented state persistence and page routing logic using Browser Cookies
Optimized real-time data handling for seat selection using 2D array manipulation

data.title: OTT Service Web Platform Frontend
data.goal: Build a component-based architecture and integrate external APIs for dynamic content delivery
features: Streamlined user interactions by managing global states with React Context API
Integrated TMDB API to dynamically map large-scale raw movie data into UI components
Established modular component structures to enhance Git-based collaboration efficiency

data.title: Terminal Reservation Database Design
data.goal: Execute full-cycle DB modeling from requirements analysis to logical/physical design based on normalization principles
features: Minimized data redundancy and ensured integrity by applying 3rd Normal Form (3NF)
Designed a service-oriented relational model by distinguishing Master and Transactional tables
Optimized complex SQL queries (JOIN, Subqueries) to improve data retrieval performance

data.title: Restaurant Review Management System
data.goal: Develop a web service using Spring Boot MVC architecture with integrated CRUD and data calculation features
features: Separated concerns through Controller-Service-Repository layers to improve maintainability
Implemented automated logic for real-time rating averages using MySQL integration
Enhanced data navigation efficiency by implementing server-side pagination with Thymeleaf

data.title: Air Quality Data Analysis Project
data.goal: Collect and preprocess public data to visualize air pollution trends in Seoul
features: Ensured data integrity through rigorous preprocessing and missing value (NaN) handling
Developed data aggregation logic using Groupby operations to analyze annual pollution trends
Maximized data readability by generating multi-dimensional visualizations (Bar/Line charts)

data.title: Car Renting Service
data.goal: Real-time rental platform with a data-driven admin dashboard.
features: GUEST ID: test PW: 1234
ADMIN ID: admin PW: 1234
Implemented real-time vehicle search, multi-criteria filtering, and booking flows for users.
Developed an admin dashboard for inventory control, reservation tracking, and data visualization.
Optimized search performance by implementing MyBatis Dynamic SQL for complex queries.
Designed a robust API architecture using Axios Interceptors for global error handling.
Deployed the full-stack ecosystem using Cloudtype PaaS for stable live service operation.
